variants.title: Filtrec WX594 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WX594. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WX594 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 100.5 mm, Length: 360.0 mm
